assertions.description: INA745x current/power monitors (U101, U201) not detected -- current_sense array empty despite dedicated current sensing ICs
REVIEW: SPI nets SNS_SPI_SCK, SNS_SPI_MOSI, SNS_SPI_MISO falsely detected as I2C SCL/SDA -- pin-name fallback doesn't exclude nets already identified as SPI
REVIEW: BME688_CS net reported as I2C SDA because Teensy pin 39 has multi-function name '17_A3_TX4_SDA1'
